subject: English
overall_learning_objectives: Analyse the story 'Wisdom Paves the Way' from literary and thematic perspectives
Evaluate how wisdom and critical thinking influence decision-making
Interpret the motivations and actions of characters
Develop analytical reading and reflective thinking skills
Strengthen language skills through discussion, writing, and comprehension exercises

lesson_plan.title: Exploring the Concept of Wisdom
topics_covered: Role of wisdom in leadership and daily life
student_activities: Discuss situations where wisdom is required
Compare knowledge and wisdom using examples

lesson_plan.title: Close Reading and Character Analysis
student_activities: Identify qualities that reflect wisdom in the story

lesson_plan.title: Conflict and Critical Analysis
topics_covered: Role of reasoning in resolving conflicts
student_activities: Analyse the cause of the problem in the story
Propose alternative solutions before the resolution is revealed

lesson_plan.title: Resolution and Thematic Interpretation
topics_covered: Application of the lesson to real-life situations
student_activities: Write a reflective paragraph on the theme
Discuss how wise decision-making helps in real life

lesson_plan.title: Language Skills and Critical Reflection
topics_covered: Summary and interpretation of the story
student_activities: Write a detailed summary of the story
Answer analytical questions about the theme and characters

teacher_tip: Encourage students to think critically about how wisdom influences decisions in the story. Ask them to connect the lesson with real-life situations where careful thinking leads to better outcomes.
